sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n35381" key="e)nenhkontamoiri/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐνενηκοντᾰ-μοιρία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n35381.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">arc of ninety degrees,</tr_> Pancharius ap.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heph.</author> </bibl> Astr.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1402.tlg001:2:11" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.11</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
